name: Phantasialand
description: Phantasialand is a theme park in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany that attracts approximately 2 million visitors annually.  It was opened in 1967 by Gottlieb Löffelhardt and Richard Schmidt.  Although starting as a family-oriented park, it has added thrill rides, especially in recent years.
imageAttribution: Kaiserplatz in the Berlin themed area
